title: Two Sum Playground
inputFormat: A list of integers and a target integer.
outputFormat: Two indices i and j such that nums[i] + nums[j] = target.

visuals.title: Hash Map Idea
visuals.caption: Store seen values and look up complement in O(1).

solutionVisuals.title: Complement Lookup Flow
solutionVisuals.caption: Each number checks if target - num exists in map.
